queries.question: Show me the metrics associated with each product manager.
queries.sql: SELECT Metrics.metric_name  from Product_Managers_Metrics join Metrics on Product_Managers_Metrics.metrics_id = Metrics.id join Product_Managers on Product_Managers_Metrics.product_manager_id = Product_Managers.id   GROUP BY Product_Managers_Metrics.metrics_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Product_Managers_Metrics.product_manager_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Product_Managers)

queries.question: Show me the metrics associated with each product manager.
queries.sql: select product_managers.name , metrics.metric_name from Product_Managers_Metrics join Metrics on Product_Managers_Metrics.metrics_id = Metrics.id join Product_Managers on Product_Managers_Metrics.product_manager_id = Product_Managers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?metric_name WHERE {
  ?product_managers_metrics a :Product_Managers_Metrics .
  ?metrics a :Metrics .
  ?product_managers_metrics p:hasMetrics ?metrics .
  ?product_managers a :Product_Managers .
  ?product_managers_metrics p:hasProduct_Managers ?product_managers .
  ?product_managers p:name ?name .
  ?metrics p:metric_name ?metric_name .
}

queries.question: For each product manager, what are the corresponding values of metrics?
queries.sql: select product_managers.name , metrics.value from Product_Managers_Metrics join Metrics on Product_Managers_Metrics.metrics_id = Metrics.id join Product_Managers on Product_Managers_Metrics.product_manager_id = Product_Managers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?value WHERE {
  ?product_managers_metrics a :Product_Managers_Metrics .
  ?metrics a :Metrics .
  ?product_managers_metrics p:hasMetrics ?metrics .
  ?product_managers a :Product_Managers .
  ?product_managers_metrics p:hasProduct_Managers ?product_managers .
  ?product_managers p:name ?name .
  ?metrics p:value ?value .
}

queries.question: What values are associated with each product manager's metrics?
queries.sql: SELECT Metrics.value  from Product_Managers_Metrics join Metrics on Product_Managers_Metrics.metrics_id = Metrics.id join Product_Managers on Product_Managers_Metrics.product_manager_id = Product_Managers.id   GROUP BY Product_Managers_Metrics.metrics_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Product_Managers_Metrics.product_manager_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Product_Managers)

queries.question: For every product manager, show me the corresponding metric names and values.
queries.sql: select product_managers.name , metrics.metric_name , metrics.value from Product_Managers_Metrics join Metrics on Product_Managers_Metrics.metrics_id = Metrics.id join Product_Managers on Product_Managers_Metrics.product_manager_id = Product_Managers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?metric_name ?value WHERE {
  ?product_managers_metrics a :Product_Managers_Metrics .
  ?metrics a :Metrics .
  ?product_managers_metrics p:hasMetrics ?metrics .
  ?product_managers a :Product_Managers .
  ?product_managers_metrics p:hasProduct_Managers ?product_managers .
  ?product_managers p:name ?name .
  ?metrics p:metric_name ?metric_name .
  ?metrics p:value ?value .
}

queries.question: Provide me with the metric name and value that is common for all product managers.
queries.sql: SELECT Metrics.metric_name, Metrics.value  from Product_Managers_Metrics join Metrics on Product_Managers_Metrics.metrics_id = Metrics.id join Product_Managers on Product_Managers_Metrics.product_manager_id = Product_Managers.id   GROUP BY Product_Managers_Metrics.metrics_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Product_Managers_Metrics.product_manager_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Product_Managers)
